title: New BEST local AI image generator is here!
summary: Ideogram 4 is presented as a local AI image generator offering features like text rendering, bounding box control, and prompt adherence. The video demonstrates its integration with ComfyUI and compares it to other open-source image generation tools.
writeup: The video demonstrates Ideogram 4, a local open-source text-to-image generator, and walks through installation, workflow setup, and usage on local hardware. It highlights capabilities including text rendering, prompt adherence, and bounding box control, along with integration into ComfyUI. The takeaway is a practical path to running Ideogram models locally rather than through a hosted service.
